creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #6)
> But I fail to undersand why all the bother.

I already explained it on the mailing list. Each port adds a maintenance cost on Ports project as a whole, so we as a project are interested in not keeping useless things, not doing useless work. I highly doubt that ports such as this one have any real value and users, which is why I'm trying to become 100% sure we want it in the tree.
